nasb.text: For thus says the Lord God, “My people went down at the first into Egypt to reside there; then the Assyrian oppressed them without cause.

esv.text: For thus says the Lord God: “My people went down at the first into Egypt to sojourn there, and the Assyrian oppressed them for nothing.

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說： “我的子民先前曾下到埃及，在那裡寄居； 後來有亞述人無緣無故地欺壓了他們。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说：“起先我的子民到埃及寄居，后来亚述人无缘无故地欺压他们。”

csbs.text: 主耶和华如此说： “先前我的子民下到埃及，在那里寄居； 后来亚述人无故地欺压他们。
